---
title: Hello litedown
author: Playground User
date: '`{r} Sys.Date()`'
---

# Introduction

This is a **litedown** playground powered by [webR](https://docs.r-wasm.org/webr/).
Edit this R Markdown on the left and click **Run** (or press
Ctrl/Cmd + Shift + Enter) to see the HTML output on the right.

Learn more at <https://github.com/yihui/litedown>.

## R Code

```{r}
x = 1:10
mean(x)
```

A simple plot:

```{r}
#| fig.cap = "A scatter plot", dev = "svg"
par(mar = c(4, 4, 1, .1))
plot(cars, pch = 19, col = "steelblue")
```

## Table

See @tab:penguins for the `penguins` dataset.

```{r}
#| penguins, tab.cap = "First and last 5 rows of the `penguins` dataset."
penguins
```

## Math

Inline math: $\alpha + \beta$

Display math:

$$E = mc^2$$

## Summary

You can write any R Markdown supported by litedown here!
